name: Mocha Coffee Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 1-quart airtight container or decorative gift jar; cover.
2. For a single serving, place rounded 1/4 cup Mocha Coffee Mix in a mug or cup.
3. Add 3/4 cup boiling water to the mug or cup.
4. Stir until the mix is dissolved.
5. Serve immediately.
